data.title: Primo Water Declares Special Dividend in Connection With Merger Deal
data.description: Primo Water (NYSE: PRMW) announced that its board of directors has approved a special dividend of 82 cents, which reflects an increase of 811% from its quarterly dividend rate of 9 cents. It will be payable on Nov. 21, 2024, to stockholders of record as of Nov. 5, 2024.

data.description: Investors in the financial markets need to understand that interest rates tend to drive most money shifts and activity in asset classes, especially ones with differing risk profiles.

data.title: Microsoft Ends $1 Game Pass Trial Ahead Of Call Of Duty: Black Ops 6 Launch
data.description: Microsoft pulls its $1 Game Pass trial ahead of Call of Duty: Black Ops 6 launch, pushing subscribers toward full-price tiers.
